summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TaskVoice AI MVP. Backend APIs are fully functional (11/11 tests passed). Frontend authentication, task management, analytics, and mobile responsiveness work well. One minor UI interaction issue with Emergent badge intercepting clicks in mobile view.

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent attribution badge intercepts button clicks on mobile
ui_bugs.impact: Minor - users can still use voice input and other features

passed_tests: Backend API connectivity and root endpoint
Task CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
AI task parsing with GPT-4o-mini (15 request daily limit)
Analytics endpoint with completion rate and task counts
Frontend auth flows (login/signup with proper redirects)
Dashboard task timeline display and interactions
Analytics page with stats and insights
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Consider adjusting z-index or positioning of Emergent attribution badge to prevent click interception on mobile devices. All core functionality is working correctly.
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (11/11), Frontend: 95% (1 minor mobile UI issue)
